tagline: Commissioner power questionable rulings and a permanent target on his back
secondary_logo: the man who brings us fantasy football each and every week! He only has one thought constantly on his mind and that is sports. He is off to flight school but we hardly trust this kid running our Fantasy Football League. He will bet on anything from the Super Bowl to Cricket to how many suspensions Leonard Fournette will receive this upcoming season. The answer is always at least 1. You can catch him watching random college volleyball games or random Australian soccer matches late on a Tuesday. You think you like sports
uniform_image: this kid might have ya beat.

tagline: Built on Cincinnati pride chaos and the memory of a fallen legend
franchise_story: A former Miami Dolphins fan now turned New York Giants fan. He bleeds G MEN Blue so much that he uttered the phrase “Gettelman is a top 5 GM”. He too was once a part of a frat but unlike other members of the league *cough*cough* you wouldn't have guessed it. He is a gym teacher twice over with less athleticism than you think. But as the saying goes
secondary_logo: teach. And those who can't teach
uniform_image: teach gym" The real question that is on everyones mind is.... How are his brothers and sisters?

tagline: A franchise built on dedication denial and refreshing the app way too much
franchise_story: The man with a nickname that is too hard to explain the origin story for but why would we use his first name anyways. The only man I have ever known to love everything in Pittsburgh. From his lonely Pirates to his unbearable Steelers and even to when Hines Ward made it in Dark Night Rises. He left us for South Carolina
primary_logo: moved to North Carolina to marry a girl
uniform_image: two dogs and a new house. He is the closest yet the farthest thing from an adult that we have in this league. He probably will never come north of the Mason Dixon Line but that's okay because most of us hardly would go that south to see him anyways.

tagline: A family operation with just enough dysfunction to fit right into the league
franchise_story: Accountant by day and nothing else by night. All he has in his life is his love for boats and the New York Yankees but not much else after that! Don't text him about live sporting events because he is that guy that likes to record them! Yeah
primary_logo: he is one of those weirdos! He likes cheese balls and quesadillas more than the average person. He likes to go fishing in his spare time and considers himself the best fisherman in our town but the man just doesnt catch fish. He will tell you he's okay with that but secretly deep down he hates it. He is just bad at everything he does

tagline: A franchise name that doubles as a roster-building philosophy
franchise_story: Our most handsome friend who likes futbol more than football. Biggest Liverpool fan you will ever meet and if anyone else in this league tells you differently they are lying to you! He has been playing fantasy football longer than following the sport itself. He came around to it since we needed the seventh member for the league. By day he is a teacher at school but by afternoon he is a lovely nanny as well. He is the number one small town freshman soccer coach in the state but at least that is what he tells us. He can grow a nice beard too but since quratnine began others might have him beat.

tagline: High upside questionable process and somehow always involved in a group chat argument
franchise_story: Our MVP on and off the field. The greatest man to ever walk the earth. He left us for the beaches of South Carolina and we don't blame him one bit. He is the biggest Lebron James fan you will ever meet but don't call him a front runner! He also likes Andrew McCutchen and might be the only Indianapolis Colts fan in the world too! After not being able to handle the pandemic in Florida
primary_logo: he moved back North to become.... an Electrician? Alright you do you kid!!!

tagline: Simple name serious expectations and a franchise that refuses to overcomplicate the brand
franchise_story: A man who came to us after serving a few tours overseas yet still each Sunday watches his dreadful New York Jets take the field. He's a real (super) trooper! He makes a mean brisket and pulled pork or at least his dad does. He has gotten into fishing and gambling lately both are going just fine if you ask him. If there is one thing though about this man
primary_logo: it is that he is consistent. Go look at those weird similar yearly Fantasy Football stats. The man shaved his head over a bet nobody made with him. Thats what we call commitment.

tagline: The league’s official exterminator of hope momentum and occasionally his own roster
franchise_story: Yep. He has a cool middle name so we named the last place trophy after it. He doesn't bring much else to the table. He started liking sports and then the world started to end. He moved away to DC to get away from the rest of us. When you meet him he will introduce himself as being in a frat during his college days. Remember though that is just what they do. He is big into politics and falling asleep early at parties. But don't listen to him because in the end he's wrong and you will need to fact check him!!!
